name: freshbooks-time-tracking
title: Freshbooks Time Tracking
description: Starts and Stop a freshbooks timer and logs the session details, assigning it to a project.
author: mkykode

commands.name: toggle-timer
commands.title: FreshBooks Toggle Timer
commands.description: Quickly start or stop your FreshBooks timer

preferences.name: showHUD
preferences.label: Show HUD
preferences.title: Show HUD
preferences.description: Show HUD notification when toggling timer

commands.name: stop-timer
commands.title: FreshBooks Stop Timer
commands.description: Stop the current timer and log time with details

commands.name: timer-status
commands.title: FreshBooks Timer Status
commands.description: Check if timer is running and for how long

preferences.name: clientId
preferences.title: OAuth Client ID
preferences.description: FreshBooks OAuth App Client ID from my.freshbooks.com/#/developer

preferences.name: clientSecret
preferences.title: OAuth Client Secret
preferences.description: FreshBooks OAuth App Client Secret from my.freshbooks.com/#/developer

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
